title: Record: SEQ_LEN=4096 training
body:
Combines the current SOTA recipe with long-context training.

Changes:

- TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=4096, TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS=393216 (3/4 batch for more optimizer steps/sec)
- Muon momentum 0.99, extended warmup (1500 steps), lower LR (0.02)
- Sliding window eval (EVAL_STRIDE=64), FP16 tied embedding, overtone init, phase-transition resid_mix, NTK-aware RoPE
- Optional LOWBIT_LAYERS+LOWBIT_STEP for mixed-bit export (enables 11L configs)
- Partial result (run cut short ~570s/600s): val_bpb=1.2036 at step 8000 (non-sliding). Full run with sliding eval expected ~1.168, potentially below SOTA 1.1748.

Status: Pending complete (waiting for more compute grant) run log with final_int8_zlib_roundtrip BPB.

Summary:
Step | val_bpb (non-sliding) | Train time
-- | -- | --
0 | 4.1068 | -
1000 | 1.3695 | 58s
3000 | 1.2830 | 198s
5000 | 1.2583 | 339s
7000 | 1.2334 | 482s
8000 | 1.2036 | 554s
(cut off) | — | ~570s
